_comment: Machine-local baseline figures for the finance projector. This file (finance_config.json, same folder) is git-ignored so your real numbers stay on this machine and are never pushed to the remote. You normally never edit it by hand: on a fresh clone the dashboard shows a first-run onboarding form and writes your answers here via the local bridge server. 'bonus_threshold' is only used when 'receive_bonuses' is true; 'biweekly_deposit' is 0 if W-2 pay doesn't go to additional accounts.
_comment_mapping: 'group_buckets' is the transaction mapping set on the ingest screen: it maps each payee/destination group (a group_key) to 'spending', 'savings', or 'income'. The classifier reads it to sort transfers between your own accounts — the successor to the old account-last-4 fields. You never edit it by hand; drag groups in the mapping screen and it's written here.
